caption: A person's hands work on a craft project on a white grid mat. The project involves a greeting card with a brown base and a floral patterned panel. On this panel, a white sentiment tag reads "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things". The person, wearing a ring on their left hand and a watch on their left wrist, uses a light blue tape runner to apply adhesive. Across the sequence, they apply tape to a small white piece of paper and then carefully place and press it onto the floral card panel. Nearby on the mat are additional floral patterned paper scraps, a red stamping block, and a black ink pad. A "Stamping Jill" watermark is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame.
